RawMarkdown:
## Scott Galloway
Fractional CTO | Startup Rescue Specialist | Technical Co-Founder
Email: scott.galloway@gmail.com | Phone: 07498479614 (please email in the first instance)
Blog: mostlylucid.net | GitHub: github.com/scottgal/mostlylucidweb
## What I Do For Startups
I rescue failing technical initiatives and bootstrap startups from scratch to fundable. With 20+ years of full-stack expertise, I can be your entire technical team or fix what you have; whatever gets you to the next funding round fastest and cheapest. My superpower: building production-ready systems that look expensive but cost nothing, then transitioning them to permanent teams / platform when you're ready to scale.
## Track Record
50% infrastructure cost reductions through smart architecture—I make runway last longer
80% faster time-to-market by cutting through tech debt and over-engineering
90%+ reduction in runtime errors turning broken MVPs into investable products
MVP to funding-ready in 90 days at H3Space—hired team, built platform, delivered
Bootstrapped platforms from scratch at Very Jane and dozens of client startups—robust, scalable, fundable
Built and operated developer bootcamp with 200+ graduates at 90%+ placement—I know how to find and train talent
Hired CTOs and built technical teams for clients, then transitioned out when they were stable
## What You Get
Full-Stack Capability: I can build everything—backend (ASP.NET Core, .NET 6/7/8/9, C#, microservices, Go, Python, C++), frontend (HTMX, Alpine.js, React, Blazor), infrastructure (Azure, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD), databases (SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, OpenSearch), and AI/ML (OpenAI, vector embeddings, RAG pipelines). You don't need to hire five people when one will do.
Cost-Conscious Architecture: I design systems that start cheap and scale affordably. Serverless where it makes sense, containers where they don't, and always with an eye on burn rate. I've saved clients 50% on cloud costs while improving performance. Want to save on your £5k+ Azure / AWS bill…I can get you an equivalent system running on a couple of £40/mo Hetzner boxes.
Speed Over Perfection: I know when to cut corners and when not to. I build what you need to get funded, not what looks good on Hacker News. MVPs that actually work, technical debt that's manageable, and documentation that helps the next team.
Team Building & Transition: I don't just write code—I hire your permanent CTO, build your technical team, establish processes, and hand everything over cleanly. I've done this multiple times. I'm not trying to keep the job; I'm trying to make myself obsolete.
Crisis Management: Broken MVP? Technical co-founder quit? Failed audit before funding? I've seen it all. I come in, assess honestly, fix what's fixable, rebuild what isn't, and get you back on track.
## Technical Stack
Backend: ASP.NET Core, .NET 6/7/8/9, C#, RESTful APIs, Microservices, SignalR, gRPC | Cloud: Microsoft Azure, Azure Functions, Kubernetes, Docker, Bicep, CI/CD | AI/ML: OpenAI, ML.NET, Vector Embeddings, RAG Pipelines, Azure AI | Frontend: HTMX, Alpine.js, React, Vue.js, Blazor, Tailwind CSS | Data: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Cosmos DB, OpenSearch, Redis | DevOps: GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, Application Insights, K6 load testing
## Relevant Engagements
H3Space Ltd | Lead Engineer (Unity SaaS Platform)
Jun 2021 – Sep 2021
Brought in to rescue stalled startup. Designed complete backend cloud architecture for Unity-based SaaS platform with React frontend and GraphQL API. Hired and led globally distributed team. Delivered MVP within 90 days, enabling successful funding round. Then transitioned out.
Challenge: No technical leadership, no architecture, approaching funding deadline
Solution: Built everything from scratch—infrastructure, APIs, team, processes
Outcome: Fundable MVP in 90 days, permanent team in place, clean handover
Very Jane Ltd | Senior Backend Developer (Ecommerce Platform)
Apr 2024 – Aug 2024
Bootstrapped new ecommerce platform from absolute zero. Built scalable backend with Stripe Connect and Hyperwallet payment integrations. Created comprehensive data validation and testing infrastructure for customer imports. Production-ready system in 4 months.
Challenge: Existing system couldn't scale, needed complete rebuild on limited budget
Solution: Architected cost-effective platform with robust payment processing and data validation
Outcome: Scalable, reliable platform enabling business growth without massive technical team
Seamcor Ltd | Head of Engineering (Production Management System)
Dec 2022 – Apr 2024
Brought in to fix broken enterprise system and build proper engineering team. Re-architected entire platform, managed team of 10+ engineers, integrated Docker Compose and OpenSearch. Designed flexible deployment strategy supporting both cloud and on-premises, expanding market reach and reducing customer acquisition cost.
Challenge: Unreliable system, no team structure, losing customers
Solution: Complete re-architecture + team building + deployment flexibility
Outcome: Reliable product, functioning team, new revenue streams from flexible deployment
ZenChef Ltd | Lead Contract Developer (Legacy System Rescue)
Oct 2024 – Present
Emergency engagement to save failing distributed system. Migrated to .NET 8, reduced Azure costs, implemented proper observability with Application Insights. Stabilized complex microservices architecture during critical business period. Built a complete, from scratch admin site in a few weeks to reduce support overhead.
Challenge: Expensive, unreliable legacy system threatening business viability
Solution: Rapid modernization + cost optimization + stability improvements
Outcome: Dramatically reduced costs while improving reliability
GBG Plc (Loqate) | Lead Engineer (Address Validation System)
Aug 2022 – Nov 2022
Built high-performance global address validation system using .NET 6 microservices on Kubernetes. Implemented K6 testing infrastructure that accelerated development cycles by 80%. Delivered production-ready system in 4 months. Working with a massive k8s based system with components in C#, Go  etc..
WCOM AB | Lead Developer (Real-time Collaboration Platform)
Oct 2021 – May 2022
Developed complete real-time collaboration platform using Blazor Server, Azure Functions, and SignalR. Built screen mirroring and IPC modules via WPF. Delivered everything from backend to desktop client as sole developer.
mostlylucid limited | Fractional CTO / Technical Consultant
Jan 2012 – Present
Dozens of startup and scale-up engagements across fintech, healthcare, and ecommerce. Consistent pattern: come in during crisis or bootstrap phase, build or fix what's needed, establish team and processes, transition out. Notable projects:
Lead Architect for major Asian airline's booking system (Knockout.js + ASP.NET MVC)
R&D Developer for insurance company's IoT telemetry platform (.NET + Azure)
Research Systems Architect on UK Government National Security distributed computing project
Technical consultant for 8 international charities (limited budgets, maximum impact)
Built and operated developer bootcamp: 200+ graduates, 90%+ placement rate—proving I can build technical teams
## Earlier Experience
Huozhi Ltd (Fintech) | Technical Consultant / Dev Lead | Jun 2018 – Mar 2020
Interactive Reporting Ltd | Lead Developer | Dec 2015 – Jun 2021
Dell | Development Lead | Jan 2011 – Jul 2011
Microsoft Corp. | Program Manager II | Jan 2007 – Oct 2009 (ASP.NET team, Redmond)
Microsoft Ltd. | Application Development Consultant II | Jun 2005 – Jan 2007 (FTSE 100 clients)
StormID | Lead Developer | Feb 2003 – Jun 2005
## Education
University of Stirling – BSc (Hons) Psychology
Stirling, Scotland, UK
## How I Work
I prefer short-to-medium term engagements (3-18 months) where there's a clear goal: get to MVP, fix what's broken, hire permanent team, reach funding milestone. I'm not looking to be your permanent CTO—I'm looking to make you ready for your permanent CTO. My success is when you don't need me anymore.
Ideal for: Pre-seed to Series A startups, technical co-founder gaps, failed technical initiatives, funding deadline pressure, legacy system rescues, team bootstrap situations.
Not ideal for: Established enterprises with bureaucracy, projects requiring political navigation, situations where speed and pragmatism aren't valued.
